personalInfo.title: AI Engineer & Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.bio: AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in building scalable, AI-driven systems and automation solutions. Specialized in LLMs, RAG pipelines, Agentic AI, Computer Vision, and NLP, with strong expertise in FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and vector databases. Experienced in designing end-to-end systems (development to deployment), including ERP platforms, automation workflows, and AI-powered applications.

about.summary: AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in building scalable, AI-driven systems and automation solutions. Specialized in LLMs, RAG pipelines, Agentic AI, Computer Vision, and NLP. Experienced in designing end-to-end systems from development to deployment, including ERP platforms, automation workflows, and AI-powered applications. Skilled in MLOps and LLMOps with a focus on production-ready, real-world solutions.
highlights: Expert in LLMs, RAG Pipelines, and Agentic AI frameworks
Full-stack development with FastAPI and Next.js
Advanced Computer Vision with YOLOv8 and MediaPipe
MLOps and LLMOps expertise (Docker, MLflow, DVC, Airflow)
Production-ready end-to-end system design

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence (BSAI)
education.institution: FAST-National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences
education.description: Specialized in AI and Machine Learning with practical projects in Computer Vision, NLP, and generative AI systems

experience.description: Building scalable AI-driven systems and enterprise solutions
responsibilities: Engineered an Enterprise ERP Platform, executing mission-critical Oracle to PostgreSQL migration with optimized database schemas for high-concurrency operations
Implemented Agentic AI frameworks to automate B2B interactions, using LangChain for vendor procurement and real-time customer support response logic
Deployed AI-based CCTV surveillance solutions using YOLO and ByteTrack for real-time person tracking and facial recognition across 35+ camera feeds
Automated multi-platform social media and WhatsApp workflows using n8n and FastAPI, handling bulk data processing and dynamic content distribution for 26,000+ records

projects.title: Visure: Real-Time AI Virtual Try-On (FYP)
projects.description: A real-time sizing engine utilizing MediaPipe segmentation for live body measurements and avatar simulation, successfully reducing e-commerce return rates.
highlights: Built real-time sizing engine with MediaPipe segmentation
Architected plug-and-play inventory management system
Integrated product recommendation logic
Live WebRTC-based video processing for fashion storefronts
Successfully reduced e-commerce return rates

projects.title: Enterprise ERP & Automation System
projects.description: Comprehensive ERP platform with automated workflows and analytics dashboards for enterprise operations
highlights: Developed CEO Analytics Dashboard with secure RBAC
Automated vendor procurement with WhatsApp-based bulk broadcast
Designed streamlined workflows for purchase demand management
Enabled CSV-based bulk communication and automated response collection

projects.title: AI-Driven Social Media Automation Hub
projects.description: Smart platform for automated, context-aware posting across multiple social media platforms
highlights: Automated context-aware posting across FB, IG, and LinkedIn
Utilized LLMs for caption and hashtag generation
Implemented dynamic scheduling based on engagement patterns
Integration with national/Islamic event calendars

projects.title: Multiple Disease Prediction System
projects.description: Comprehensive diagnostic system using machine learning for disease classification with voice-enabled results
highlights: Employed SVM, Naive Bayes, and Decision Trees for classification
Rigorous data preprocessing and evaluation
Integrated Coqui TTS for voice-enabled medical reporting
Enhanced accessibility for automated diagnosis

projects.title: Disaster Response RAG Engine
projects.description: Real-time emergency guidance system using RAG pipelines for delivering safety protocols and evacuation routes
highlights: Architected recommendation system using RAG and FAISS
Sub-second retrieval times for emergency guidance
Location-aware emergency guidance capabilities
Real-time decision support during disaster scenarios

achievements.title: Project Lead — Etsolar
achievements.description: Directing technical strategy and sprint planning for the company's core SaaS products

achievements.title: Team Lead — Visure
achievements.description: Managing 3-member team for FYP development, overseeing architectural design and API documentation
